title: ranunculus inaequalis
intro: Ranunculus inaequalis, also known as Inequilateral Buttercup, is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus inaequalis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
